economic_notes: Waterhen Forestry Products LP (99.99% owned GBE) had total revenue of $12,776,784 and total expenses of $12,212,393. First Nation operates Waterhen Lake Resort LP, Waterhen Eco Lodge LP, Kiyanaw Askiy Construction LP, Waterhen General Store LP, and Waterhen Lake First Nation Development LP. Outstanding claims against Government of Canada being financed through bank loans with insurance coverage.
notes: Province is Saskatchewan (SK), not AB. Emphasis of Matter paragraph in auditor's report highlights outstanding claims against Government of Canada financed through bank loans with insurance. Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: Waterhen First Nation CMHC Housing Program (100%) and Waterhen Lake First Nation Development LP (100%). One GBE: Waterhen Forestry Products LP (99.99%) accounted for by modified equity method. Resorts and Retail segment includes multiple LPs. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($17,758,573) + MLTC Program Services ($4,067,317) + Meadow Lake Health & Social Development Authority ($1,038,667) + MLTC Child & Family Services ($881,344) + CMHC ($709,188) + Province of Saskatchewan ($56,224) + Northern Lights CDC ($52,500) + Department of Highways ($4,300) + First Nations Trust ($1,021,436) = $25,589,549 approximate; OSR includes retail sales, rental income, management fees, contracts, investment income, earnings from business entities. Deferred revenue balance cut off in source text. New PS 3400 Revenue standard adopted April 1, 2023 prospectively.
